title: Standard operating procedure for bio-optical measurements aboard of RV SONNE
author: Oelker, Julia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This standard operating procedure describes device configuration, parameter characteristics, transmission and processing of its output, ingest procedure, storage, data access possibilities, and publishing. Intended user groups are device owners, technicians, and data managers.
steps_raw: This standard operating procedure describes device configuration, parameter characteristics, transmission and processing of its output, ingest procedure, storage, data access possibilities, and publishing. Intended user groups are device owners, technicians, and data managers.
